title: auth — driver specifications
description: Two driver contracts. JwtSigner drivers wrap the HS256 signing pipeline (KMS-decrypt secret → firebase/php-jwt sign). RegistrationPolicy drivers implement the domain-specific policy strategy pattern.

methods.returns: The signed JWT (three dot-separated base64url parts: header.payload.signature). Kid resolved via ResolveJwtSigningKeyAction; secret KMS-decrypted into a stack-scoped variable inside the sign() call.
Decoded payload when signature verifies + `iss`+`aud`+`exp`+`iat` valid + not in deny list + (when expectedApplicationId given) `app` claim matches.

methods.description: Signs + verifies a synthetic payload as a round-trip probe.

methods.returns: One of RegistrationDecision::Allowed, RegistrationDecision::RequiresGuardianConsent, RegistrationDecision::Denied. Never throws — caller inspects the enum + branches.
True when THIS policy handles the given context's type (matches on #[RegistrationPolicy(contextType: X)]). Discovery uses this to dispatch.

methods.description: Revoke every active PAT for a single User. Returns the count. Fires AllSessionsRevoked.
Revoke every active PAT for every User referencing the Identity (cross-Application). Returns the count. Fires AllSessionsRevoked.

Given a permission (e.g. `athletes.viewAny.branch`) return the SQL WHERE clause needed to filter to the applicable scope. Recognises `.any`, `.tenant`, `.organization`, `.branch`, `.team`, `.child`, `.own` suffixes. Returns a ScopeFilterClause (a value object the base repository translates into an Eloquent scope).
Compute the effective minimum age. Chain: COPPA (US) → GDPR per-country → framework default (auth.principal.min_age) → tenant override (MAX only). Returns the effective floor.
Returns AgeGateDecision::Allowed | RequiresGuardianConsent | Denied. Composes the floor lookup with the guardian-consent age band.

jwt_signer_drivers.name: hs256-kms
strengths: KMS-managed key rotation via built-in KMS rotation policy
Auditable — every decrypt call appears in CloudTrail
weaknesses: Requires AWS credentials + KMS endpoint reachable
jwt_signer_drivers.config_prefix: auth.jwt (algorithm=HS256, KMS backend selected by auth.jwt.signing_backend='kms')

registration_policy_drivers.name: generic
registration_policy_drivers.purpose: Framework default. Composes CompliantAgePolicy + auth.principal.require_email_verification + user.registration.requires_invitation. Domain-specific policies (athletes, coaches, etc.) OVERRIDE by registering at lower priority.
checks: user.registration.requires_invitation → refuse when no valid invitation in the context
